Faq.heading: Commonly asked questions.
Faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about our services and academy.

item0.question: What services do you offer?
item0.answer: We offer four core services: Ecommerce stores for businesses, high-converting Landing Pages, Brand Marketing (logo, colours, social presence), and IT Consulting & Hosting (domain setup, SSL, ongoing support).

item1.question: How long does it take to build an ecommerce store?
item1.answer: A standard ecommerce store with product catalogue, cart, and payment integration is typically delivered in 2–3 weeks. More complex stores with custom features take 4–6 weeks.

item2.question: What is included in a landing page?
item2.answer: Every landing page includes mobile-first design, copywriting support, SEO basics, contact form, and fast loading speed. We focus on making it convert — not just look good.

item3.question: What does Brand Marketing cover?
item3.answer: Brand Marketing includes logo design, colour palette, typography, and social media profile setup. You will have everything you need to look professional from day one.

item4.question: Can you help with hosting and domain setup?
item4.answer: Yes. Our IT Consulting & Hosting service covers domain registration, hosting configuration, SSL certificates, email setup, and ongoing technical support so your site stays live and secure.

item5.question: Who is Aura Academy for?
item5.answer: Aura Academy is built for college students who want to move beyond theory and work on real projects. If you know basic programming and want hands-on experience, you are the right fit.

item6.question: What will I learn in the Master DSA program?
item6.answer: You will master Data Structures and Algorithms through real problem-solving — arrays, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and everything technical interviews actually test.

item7.question: What does the AI Integration program cover?
item7.answer: You will learn to build real AI-powered features — connecting LLMs to applications, automating tasks, building chatbots, and shipping working AI tools. Practical, not theoretical.

item8.question: How does Interview Preparation Guidance work?
item8.answer: We provide structured 1-on-1 sessions with mock technical interviews, detailed feedback on your performance, and a personalised roadmap based on your weak areas.

item9.question: Do I need experience to join the Academy?
item9.answer: Basic programming knowledge is helpful but you do not need to be an expert. We will assess where you are and guide you from there. The goal is real growth, not a prerequisite list.
